Summary: Solo project focused on reusable procedural animation technology
Built as a portfolio showcase and technical foundation for a larger professional game project
Creatures adapt their leg placement to surrounding surfaces instead of relying only on authored animations
Legs step procedurally based on body velocity, helping movement respond naturally to direction and speed changes
Designed with configurable legs and stepping areas so the system can be adapted to different creature bodies
Current rewrite focuses on cleaner architecture and improved suitability for use outside the original spider demo
